searchTermsTried: Henry Ford Hospital Detroit visiting medical student VSLO international elective site:henryford.com

candidateFindings.shortQuote: Students who are not base clerkship students of a Henry Ford Health location must use VSLO to apply for rotations. Henry Ford Hospital charges a $125 administrative fee for each elective rotation through VSLO.

International medical students are only eligible for elective rotation if they are a former HFH employee or have an immediate family member who is a current or former HFH employee/volunteer. Elective rotation only; Clerkships are not available to international students.

negativeEvidence.strongNegativeEvidence: International lane is extremely restricted: only former HFH employees or immediate family of current/former HFH employees/volunteers. Not an open international pathway.

nextAction: For public-safe activation: (a) US LCME/COCA via VSLO, $125 admin fee; (b) international lane is HFH-employee-or-family-only — must NOT be presented as an open international pathway; (c) clerkships not available to international students verbatim.
plainEnglishSummary: Henry Ford Hospital accepts visiting medical students through VSLO with a $125 administrative fee per rotation. International medical students have an extremely narrow lane: only former HFH employees or immediate family of current/former HFH employees/volunteers may apply, elective only (no clerkships). This is essentially affiliated-only and not an open international pathway.
driftCheck: This advanced national USCE discovery because MI gained a P101 packet with a notable HFH-employee-or-family international restriction captured verbatim — protects against overclaim that HFH is open to general IMG observers.
